name: Red Panda
conservationEfforts: Red Panda Network supports community-based conservation in Nepal. Forest guardians program employs local people to protect habitat. Captive breeding programs in over 80 zoos.
description: Despite its name, the red panda is not closely related to the giant panda. This cat-sized mammal is the only living member of its family and spends most of its life in trees eating bamboo.
